name: Vassar College
meets_full_need_notes: Vassar meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic undergraduates. Vassar is need-blind for all domestic applicants.
no_loan_notes: Vassar has a no-loan policy for all students receiving financial aid. All need-based aid is in the form of grants. No income threshold — applies to all aid recipients.

merit_thresholds.notes: Vassar offers a limited number of merit scholarships, primarily the Vassar Scholarship and some special talent awards. The vast majority of Vassar's $180M+ annual aid budget goes to need-based grants. Merit awards are relatively few and highly selective.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based financial aid as RD applicants. Vassar meets full need regardless of admission round.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal their financial aid award by contacting the Office of Financial Aid. Appeals require written documentation of changed circumstances, special expenses, or significant changes in family financial situation.
